ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the data collection */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geographical region */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the population group (e.g., male, female) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the population (e.g., a00, a01) */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value representing the demographic statistic */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the data */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data entry */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_age_group FOREIGN KEY ("age_group") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_sex FOREIGN KEY ("sex") REFERENCES sexes ("sex_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., DK01) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code to which the region belongs */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the region data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year of data collection (e.g., y2001, y2002) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year for data collection */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year for data collection */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the year data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group (e.g., a00, a01) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age in the age group */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age in the age group */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the age group data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex category */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex (e.g., b for male, g for female) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sex category */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the sex data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., census, survey) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data source information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
